author: THSV StreamBridge
description: Translates only explicit viewer requests through a disclosed no-key provider, then returns bounded results to the originating platform without retaining message text.
changelog: 1.0.0: initial release with configurable language-code and generic commands, documented Twitch reply context, original-author attribution, MyMemory HTTPS translation, platform-aware output splitting, bounded request state, timeouts, per-user/global cooldowns, provider failure handling, and privacy disclosure.

manifest.name: User Translate
installationSteps: Install and enable the add-on, then review the external translation privacy disclosure in its settings.
Import the User Translate Streamer.bot package and approve its Translate Text action for this add-on.
Choose the command prefix and enabled language codes in the add-on settings; no separate Streamer.bot command is required.
Examples: !translate es hello, !es hello, or on Twitch reply to a message with !es.
uninstallationSteps: Uninstall the add-on. Only bounded cooldown metadata is retained; message text is never stored.

healthChecks.description: Confirms bounded command handling, provider dispatch, and source-platform response routing.
